---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for the Trickle contracts
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like — new functions, data structures, or contract changes.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Scope

Which contract(s) does this affect?

- [ ] `trickle-stream` (core streaming contract)
- [ ] `stream-factory` (planned)
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional Context

Links, references to other protocols, or screenshots.
